<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ja">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Fuwatti's Select Furniture</title>
<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Zen+Maru+Gothic:wght@400;500;700&family=Shippori+Mincho:wght@400;600&display=swap');

:root {
  --cream: #f5f0e8;
  --warm-white: #faf8f4;
  --sand: #e8ddc8;
  --bark: #8b6f4e;
  --bark-light: #b8977a;
  --bark-dark: #5c4530;
  --moss: #7a8c6a;
  --moss-light: #a8b898;
  --terracotta: #c4764a;
  --stone: #9a9080;
  --stone-light: #d4cec4;
  --text-main: #3a2e22;
  --text-sub: #7a6a58;
  --text-muted: #b0a090;
}

*{ box-sizing:border-box; margin:0; padding:0; }
body {
  background:var(--cream);
  background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg width='60' height='60' viewBox='0 0 60 60' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cg fill='none' fill-rule='evenodd'%3E%3Cg fill='%238b6f4e' fill-opacity='0.04'%3E%3Cpath d='M36 34v-4h-2v4h-4v2h4v4h2v-4h4v-2h-4zm0-30V0h-2v4h-4v2h4v4h2V6h4V4h-4zM6 34v-4H4v4H0v2h4v4h2v-4h4v-2H6zM6 4V0H4v4H0v2h4v4h2V6h4V4H6z'/%3E%3C/g%3E%3C/g%3E%3C/svg%3E");
  font-family:'Zen Maru Gothic', 'Hiragino Kaku Gothic ProN', sans-serif;
  color:var(--text-main); min-height:100vh;
}

/* ── QR SHARE BTN ── */
.qr-share-btn {
  position:fixed; top:16px; right:16px; z-index:1000;
  background:var(--bark); color:#faf8f4; border-radius:24px;
  padding:8px 16px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px;
  font-size:13px; font-weight:700; cursor:pointer;
  box-shadow:0 3px 14px rgba(139,111,78,.3); border:none;
  transition:all .2s;
}
.qr-share-btn:hover { background:var(--bark-dark); transform:translateY(-1px); }
.qr-modal { display:none; position:fixed; inset:0; background:rgba(58,46,34,.5);
  backdrop-filter:blur(4px); z-index:2000; align-items:center; justify-content:center; }
.qr-modal.open { display:flex; }
.qr-modal-inner { background:var(--warm-white); border-radius:16px; padding:28px 32px; text-align:center;
  box-shadow:0 16px 48px rgba(58,46,34,.2); max-width:280px; width:90%;
  animation:popIn .2s ease; border:1px solid var(--sand); }
@keyframes popIn { from{transform:scale(.85);opacity:0} to{transform:scale(1);opacity:1} }
.qr-modal-header { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center;
  margin-bottom:18px; font-size:15px; font-weight:700; color:var(--bark-dark); }
.qr-close { background:var(--sand); border:1.5px solid var(--stone-light); color:var(--bark); border-radius:50%;
  width:28px; height:28px; font-size:13px; cursor:pointer; font-weight:700; }
.qr-copy-btn { margin-top:8px; background:var(--bark); color:#faf8f4; border:none; border-radius:20px;
  padding:10px 28px; font-size:14px; font-weight:700; cursor:pointer; }

/* ── HERO ── */
.hero {
  background:linear-gradient(160deg,#ede6d8 0%,#e4d9c4 50%,#ede6d8 100%);
  padding:8px 24px 32px;
  display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center;
  text-align:center; position:relative; overflow:hidden;
  border-bottom: 2px solid var(--sand);
}
.hero::before {
  content:''; position:absolute; inset:0;
  background:url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg width='80' height='80' viewBox='0 0 80 80' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cg fill='%238b6f4e' fill-opacity='0.06'%3E%3Ccircle cx='40' cy='40' r='2'/%3E%3C/g%3E%3C/svg%3E");
  pointer-events:none;
}
.hero-img {
  width:167px; height:167px; object-fit:contain;
  filter:drop-shadow(0 8px 24px rgba(139,111,78,.25));
  animation:float 4s ease-in-out infinite;
  margin-bottom:0px;
}
@keyframes float { 0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)} 50%{transform:translateY(-10px)} }
.hero h1 {
  font-size:26px; font-weight:700; color:var(--bark-dark);
  font-family:'Shippori Mincho', serif;
  letter-spacing:3px; line-height:1.2; margin-bottom:4px;
}
.hero-sub { font-size:16px; font-weight:500; color:var(--bark); letter-spacing:4px; margin-bottom:20px; }

/* ── SNS LINK BUTTONS ── */
.sns-links {
  display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:10px;
  width:100%; max-width:440px; margin:0 auto;
}
.sns-link-item {
  display:flex; align-items:center; gap:14px;
  background:rgba(250,248,244,.85); border:1.5px solid var(--sand);
  border-radius:12px; padding:11px 18px;
  text-decoration:none; color:var(--text-main);
  font-size:15px; font-weight:700;
  box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(139,111,78,.08);
  transition:all .2s; backdrop-filter:blur(4px);
}
.sns-link-item:hover { transform:translateY(-2px); box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(139,111,78,.16); background:rgba(250,248,244,.97); }
.sns-icon {
  width:48px; height:48px; border-radius:10px;
  display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
  background:var(--sand); border:1px solid var(--stone-light); flex-shrink:0;
}
.sns-icon svg { width:26px; height:26px; }
.sns-link-item.youtube .sns-icon { background:#fff0ee; border-color:#f0d0ca; }
.sns-link-item.instagram .sns-icon { background:#fff4f0; border-color:#f0d8cc; }
.sns-link-item.tiktok .sns-icon { background:#f0f0ee; border-color:#ddd8d0; }
.sns-link-item.line .sns-icon { background:#f0f8f0; border-color:#c0d8b8; }

/* ── TAB SECTION ── */
.tab-section { padding:20px 16px 0; max-width:1200px; margin:0 auto; }
.tab-bar { display:flex; gap:8px; margin-bottom:0; }
.tab-btn {
  background:var(--warm-white); border:1.5px solid var(--sand); color:var(--bark);
  padding:10px 24px; border-radius:14px 14px 0 0;
  font-size:14px; font-weight:700; cursor:pointer;
  transition:all .2s; border-bottom:none;
  font-family:'Zen Maru Gothic',sans-serif;
}
.tab-btn.active {
  background:var(--bark); border-color:var(--bark); color:#faf8f4;
  box-shadow:0 -2px 8px rgba(139,111,78,.2);
}
.tab-content {
  background:var(--warm-white); border:1.5px solid var(--sand); border-radius:0 14px 14px 14px;
  padding:16px; display:none;
}
.tab-content.active { display:block; }

/* ── SEARCH BAR ── */
.search-wrap { position:relative; margin-bottom:12px; }
.search-input {
  width:100%; padding:10px 16px 10px 40px;
  border:1.5px solid var(--sand); border-radius:24px;
  font-size:14px; color:var(--text-main); background:var(--warm-white);
  outline:none; transition:all .2s;
  font-family:'Zen Maru Gothic',sans-serif;
}
.search-input:focus { border-color:var(--bark); background:#fff; box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(139,111,78,.1); }
.search-icon {
  position:absolute; left:13px; top:50%; transform:translateY(-50%);
  font-size:16px; pointer-events:none; color:var(--text-muted);
}
.search-clear {
  position:absolute; right:12px; top:50%; transform:translateY(-50%);
  background:none; border:none; font-size:16px; color:var(--text-muted);
  cursor:pointer; display:none; line-height:1;
}
.search-clear.show { display:block; }
.search-result-count {
  font-size:11px; color:var(--text-muted); font-weight:700;
  margin-bottom:8px; padding-left:4px; min-height:16px;
}
.no-results {
  display:none; text-align:center; padding:40px 20px;
  color:var(--text-muted); font-size:14px; font-weight:700;
  grid-column: 1/-1;
}
.no-results.show { display:block; }

/* ── FILTER BAR ── */
.filter-bar {
  display:flex; gap:6px; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-bottom:14px; align-items:center;
}
.filter-btn {
  background:var(--warm-white); border:1.5px solid var(--sand); color:var(--bark);
  padding:6px 14px; border-radius:20px; font-size:12px; font-weight:700;
  cursor:pointer; transition:all .2s; white-space:nowrap;
  font-family:'Zen Maru Gothic',sans-serif;
}
.filter-btn:hover, .filter-btn.active {
  background:var(--bark); border-color:var(--bark); color:#faf8f4;
}
.cat-toggle-btn {
  background:var(--sand); border:1.5px solid var(--stone-light); color:var(--bark-dark);
  padding:6px 14px; border-radius:20px; font-size:12px;
  font-weight:700; cursor:pointer; transition:all .2s;
  margin-left:auto; font-family:'Zen Maru Gothic',sans-serif;
}
.cat-toggle-btn.on { background:var(--bark); color:#faf8f4; border-color:var(--bark); }

/* ── GRID ── */
.grid {
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);
  gap:12px;
  /* CSS order works on grid items */
}
.card {
  background:var(--warm-white); border-radius:12px;
  border:1.5px solid var(--sand);
  box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(139,111,78,.06);
  cursor:pointer; transition:all .18s;
  display:flex; flex-direction:column;
  overflow:hidden;
  aspect-ratio:1/1;
}
.card:hover { transform:translateY(-3px); box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(139,111,78,.15); border-color:var(--bark-light); }
.card-num { font-size:10px; color:var(--text-main); font-weight:700; padding:8px 10px 4px;
  white-space:nowrap; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis;
  line-height:1.6; }

/* おすすめバッジがある場合は上部にスペースを確保 */
.card[data-recommended="true"] .card-num {
  padding-top: 26px;
}
.card-svg-wrap {
  display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
  padding:6px 16px 0; background:var(--cream);
  flex:1; min-height:0;
}
.card-svg-wrap svg { width:70%; height:auto; max-height:80px; display:block; }
.card-bottom { padding:10px 12px 12px; }
.card-name { font-size:12px; font-weight:700; color:var(--text-main); line-height:1.35; margin-bottom:5px; }
.card-cat-tag {
  display:inline-block; font-size:10px; color:var(--bark); font-weight:700;
  background:var(--sand); border:1px solid var(--stone-light); padding:2px 8px; border-radius:10px;
  margin-bottom:5px;
}
.card-price { font-size:14px; font-weight:900; color:var(--terracotta); }
.card-btn-wrap { padding:0; margin-top:0; }
.card-detail-btn {
  width:100%; padding:10px 0;
  background:var(--bark); color:#faf8f4;
  border:none; border-radius:0 0 10px 10px;
  font-size:12px; font-weight:700;
  cursor:pointer; transition:all .2s;
  letter-spacing:1px; display:block;
  font-family:'Zen Maru Gothic',sans-serif;
}
.card-detail-btn:hover { background:var(--bark-dark); }

/* ── RECOMMENDED BADGE ── */
.card[data-recommended="true"] {
  border-color: var(--terracotta);
  box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(196,118,74,.22);
  order: -1;
}
.card[data-recommended="true"]:hover {
  border-color: var(--terracotta);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 28px rgba(196,118,74,.28);
}
.recommended-badge {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px;
  background: var(--terracotta); color: #fff;
  font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 1px;
  padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 0 0 8px 0;
  position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0;
  font-family: 'Zen Maru Gothic', sans-serif;
  z-index: 1;
}
.card {
  position: relative;
}

/* ── MODAL ── */
.modal-overlay {
  display:none; position:fixed; inset:0;
  background:rgba(58,46,34,.55); backdrop-filter:blur(6px);
  z-index:3000; align-items:center; justify-content:center; padding:16px;
}
.modal-overlay.open { display:flex; }
.modal-box {
  background:var(--warm-white); border-radius:16px; width:100%; max-width:520px;
  max-height:90vh; overflow-y:auto;
  box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(58,46,34,.25);
  animation:popIn .2s ease;
  border:1px solid var(--sand);
}
.modal-header {
  display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center;
  padding:16px 20px 0;
}
.modal-num { font-size:11px; color:var(--text-muted); font-weight:700; }
.modal-date { font-size:11px; color:var(--text-muted); font-weight:700; letter-spacing:0.5px; }
.modal-close {
  background:var(--sand); border:1.5px solid var(--stone-light); color:var(--bark);
  border-radius:50%; width:30px; height:30px; font-size:15px;
  cursor:pointer; font-weight:700; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
}
.modal-img {
  display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
  padding:16px; background:var(--cream); border-bottom:1px solid var(--sand);
}
.modal-img svg { width:120px; height:100px; }
.modal-name { font-size:17px; font-weight:700; color:var(--text-main); padding:14px 20px 4px; line-height:1.3;
  font-family:'Shippori Mincho',serif; }
.modal-tags { padding:0 20px 12px; display:flex; gap:6px; align-items:center; }
.modal-cat { font-size:11px; color:var(--bark); font-weight:700; background:var(--sand); border:1px solid var(--stone-light); padding:3px 10px; border-radius:10px; }
.modal-shop-label {
  margin-left:auto; font-size:10px; color:var(--text-muted);
  font-weight:700; letter-spacing:1px;
}
.modal-sec { padding:0 20px 10px; }
.modal-lbl { font-size:10px; color:var(--text-muted); font-weight:700; letter-spacing:1px; display:block; margin-bottom:3px; }
.modal-val { font-size:13px; color:var(--text-main); line-height:1.5; }
.modal-2col { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:8px; padding:0 20px 10px; }
.modal-box-item { background:var(--cream); border-radius:8px; padding:8px 10px; }
.modal-sizes { display:flex; gap:8px; margin:0 20px 10px; background:var(--cream); border-radius:8px; padding:10px; }
.sz { flex:1; text-align:center; }
.sz .sl { font-size:9px; color:var(--text-muted); display:block; }
.sz .sv { font-size:14px; font-weight:700; color:var(--bark-dark); }
.modal-pc { padding:0 20px 10px; }
.modal-highlight { background:#fdf8f0; border:1px solid var(--bark-light); border-radius:8px; padding:10px 12px; }
.modal-highlight .ml { color:var(--bark); font-size:10px; font-weight:700; display:block; margin-bottom:3px; letter-spacing:1px; }
.modal-highlight p { font-size:12px; line-height:1.5; color:var(--bark-dark); }
.modal-price-row {
  display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between;
  padding:12px 20px; border-top:1px solid var(--sand); background:var(--cream);
}
.m-price { font-size:22px; font-weight:900; color:var(--terracotta); }
.m-price span { font-size:11px; color:var(--text-muted); }
.modal-shops { display:flex; flex-direction:row; gap:8px; width:100%; }
.shop-btn {
  display:flex; flex-direction:row; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
  gap:8px; padding:12px 16px; border-radius:14px;
  font-size:14px; font-weight:700; text-decoration:none;
  transition:all .2s; box-shadow:0 3px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.1);
  flex:1;
}
.shop-btn:hover { transform:translateY(-3px); box-shadow:0 7px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.18); }
.shop-btn .shop-icon { font-size:26px; line-height:1; }
.shop-btn.rakuten { background:linear-gradient(135deg,#e00000,#bf0000); color:#fff; }
.shop-btn.amazon  { background:linear-gradient(135deg,#FFB300,#FF9900); color:#111; }
.modal-footer { padding:10px 20px 16px; border-top:1px solid var(--sand); }
.modal-rev { font-size:15px; color:var(--terracotta); font-weight:700; }
.feature-box {
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--cream) 0%,var(--warm-white) 100%);
  border:1.5px solid var(--sand); border-radius:12px;
  padding:12px 14px;
}
.feature-box-title {
  font-size:10px; font-weight:700; color:var(--bark);
  letter-spacing:1px; margin-bottom:8px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:4px;
}
.feature-list { list-style:none; padding:0; margin:0; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:5px; }
.feature-list li {
  font-size:12px; color:var(--text-main); line-height:1.45;
  display:flex; align-items:flex-start; gap:6px;
}
.feature-list li::before { content:'✦'; color:var(--moss); font-size:10px; margin-top:2px; flex-shrink:0; }

@media(max-width:900px){ .grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);} }
@media(max-width:580px){ .grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);} .hero-img{width:167px;height:167px;} .hero h1{font-size:20px;} }

/* ── LINK SECTION ── */
.link-section { padding:20px 16px 40px; max-width:480px; margin:0 auto; }
.links-wrap { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:12px; }

/* furniture accordion wrapper */
.link-item-accordion { width:100%; }
.furniture-link {
  width:100%; cursor:pointer; user-select:none;
  justify-content:flex-start !important;
  position:relative;
}
.link-label { flex:1; }
.furn-arrow {
  font-size:12px; color:var(--text-muted); transition:transform .3s;
  position:absolute; right:18px;
}
.furn-arrow.open { transform:rotate(180deg); color:var(--bark); }
.furn-icon { background:var(--sand) !important; border-color:var(--stone-light) !important; }

/* furniture panel */
.furniture-panel {
  background:var(--warm-white);
  border:1.5px solid var(--sand);
  border-top:none;
  border-radius:0 0 14px 14px;
  padding:14px;
  animation:slideDown .25s ease;
}
@keyframes slideDown {
  from { opacity:0; transform:translateY(-8px); }
  to   { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); }
}

/* fix filter bar inside panel */
.furniture-panel .filter-bar { flex-wrap:wrap; gap:6px; margin-bottom:12px; display:flex; align-items:center; }
.furniture-panel .filter-btn {
  background:var(--warm-white); border:1.5px solid var(--sand); color:var(--bark);
  padding:5px 12px; border-radius:16px; font-size:11px; font-weight:700;
  cursor:pointer; transition:all .2s; white-space:nowrap;
}
.furniture-panel .filter-btn.active,
.furniture-panel .filter-btn:hover {
  background:var(--bark); border-color:var(--bark); color:#faf8f4;
}
.furniture-panel .cat-toggle-btn {
  margin-left:auto; background:var(--sand); border:1.5px solid var(--stone-light);
  color:var(--bark-dark); padding:5px 12px; border-radius:16px; font-size:11px;
  font-weight:700; cursor:pointer;
}
.furniture-panel .cat-toggle-btn.on { background:var(--bark); color:#faf8f4; border-color:var(--bark); }

/* grid inside panel */
.furniture-panel .grid { grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr); gap:10px; }
@media(max-width:700px) { .furniture-panel .grid { grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr); } }
@media(max-width:420px) { .furniture-panel .grid { grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr); } }

/* furniture panel wrap (below hero) */
.furniture-panel-wrap.hidden { display:none; }
.furniture-panel-wrap {
  max-width:480px; margin:0 auto;
  background:var(--warm-white); border:1.5px solid var(--sand);
  border-top:none; border-radius:0 0 16px 16px;
  padding:14px; animation:slideDown .25s ease;
}
.furniture-panel-inner .filter-bar { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:6px; margin-bottom:12px; align-items:center; }
.furniture-panel-inner .filter-btn {
  background:var(--warm-white); border:1.5px solid var(--sand); color:var(--bark);
  padding:5px 12px; border-radius:16px; font-size:11px; font-weight:700;
  cursor:pointer; transition:all .2s; white-space:nowrap;
}
.furniture-panel-inner .filter-btn.active,
.furniture-panel-inner .filter-btn:hover { background:var(--bark); border-color:var(--bark); color:#faf8f4; }
.furniture-panel-inner .cat-toggle-btn {
  margin-left:auto; background:var(--sand); border:1.5px solid var(--stone-light);
  color:var(--bark-dark); padding:5px 12px; border-radius:16px; font-size:11px; font-weight:700; cursor:pointer;
}
.furniture-panel-inner .cat-toggle-btn.on { background:var(--bark); color:#faf8f4; border-color:var(--bark); }
.furniture-panel-inner .grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr); gap:10px; max-width:100%; }
@media(max-width:700px){ .furniture-panel-inner .grid { grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr); } }
@media(max-width:420px){ .furniture-panel-inner .grid { grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr); } }

/* furniture link */
.furniture-link { cursor:pointer; user-select:none; position:relative; }
.furniture-link:hover { background:rgba(250,248,244,0.97) !important; }
.link-label { flex:1; font-size:15px; font-weight:700; color:var(--bark-dark); }
.furn-arrow { font-size:13px; color:var(--text-muted); transition:transform .3s; }
.furn-arrow.open { transform:rotate(180deg); color:var(--bark); }
.furn-icon { background:var(--sand) !important; border-color:var(--stone-light) !important; }

.modal-price-row {
  display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between;
  padding:12px 20px; border-top:1px solid var(--sand); background:var(--cream);
}
.m-price { font-size:22px; font-weight:900; color:var(--terracotta); }
.m-price span { font-size:11px; color:var(--text-muted); }

/* ── SORT BUTTON ── */
.sort-bar {
  display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:flex-end;
  margin-bottom:10px; position:relative;
}
.sort-btn {
  background:var(--warm-white); border:1.5px solid var(--sand); color:var(--bark);
  padding:6px 14px; border-radius:20px; font-size:12px; font-weight:700;
  cursor:pointer; transition:all .2s; white-space:nowrap;
  font-family:'Zen Maru Gothic',sans-serif;
  display:flex; align-items:center; gap:5px;
}
.sort-btn:hover, .sort-btn.active {
  background:var(--bark); border-color:var(--bark); color:#faf8f4;
}
.sort-btn .sort-arrow { font-size:10px; transition:transform .2s; }
.sort-btn.open .sort-arrow { transform:rotate(180deg); }
.sort-dropdown {
  display:none; position:absolute; top:calc(100% + 6px); right:0;
  background:var(--warm-white); border:1.5px solid var(--sand);
  border-radius:12px; box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(139,111,78,.15);
  z-index:100; min-width:150px; overflow:hidden;
  animation:popIn .15s ease;
}
.sort-dropdown.open { display:block; }
.sort-option {
  display:block; width:100%; text-align:left;
  padding:10px 16px; font-size:13px; font-weight:700;
  color:var(--bark); background:none; border:none;
  cursor:pointer; transition:background .15s;
  font-family:'Zen Maru Gothic',sans-serif;
  white-space:nowrap;
}
.sort-option:hover { background:var(--sand); }
.sort-option.selected { color:var(--bark-dark); background:var(--cream); }
.sort-option + .sort-option { border-top:1px solid var(--sand); }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- 共有ボタン（右上固定） -->
<button class="qr-share-btn" onclick="openQRModal()">
  <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor">
    <path d="M18 16.08c-.76 0-1.44.3-1.96.77L8.91 12.7c.05-.23.09-.46.09-.7s-.04-.47-.09-.7l7.05-4.11c.54.5 1.25.81 2.04.81 1.66 0 3-1.34 3-3s-1.34-3-3-3-3 1.34-3 3c0 .24.04.47.09.7L8.04 9.81C7.5 9.31 6.79 9 6 9c-1.66 0-3 1.34-3 3s1.34 3 3 3c.79 0 1.5-.31 2.04-.81l7.12 4.16c-.05.21-.08.43-.08.65 0 1.61 1.31 2.92 2.92 2.92s2.92-1.31 2.92-2.92-1.31-2.92-2.92-2.92z"/>
  </svg>
  共有
</button>

<!-- 共有モーダル -->
<div class="qr-modal" id="qr-modal" onclick="if(event.target===this)closeQRModal()">
  <div class="qr-modal-inner">
    <div class="qr-modal-header">
      <span>共有する</span>
      <button class="qr-close" onclick="closeQRModal()">✕</button>
    </div>
    <button class="qr-copy-btn" onclick="copyURL()">🔗 URLをコピー</button>
  </div>
</div>




<div class="hero">
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," class="hero-img" alt="ふわっち" />
  <h1>ふわっちの部屋</h1>
  <p class="hero-sub">ラクするための厳選商品</p>

  <div class="sns-links">
    <div class="sns-link-item furniture-link" onclick="toggleFurniture()">
      <div class="sns-icon furn-icon">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="#2a7ab8" width="28" height="28">
          <path d="M7 13c1.66 0 3-1.34 3-3S8.66 7 7 7s-3 1.34-3 3 1.34 3 3 3zm12-6h-8v7H3V5H1v15h2v-3h18v3h2v-9c0-2.21-1.79-4-4-4z"/>
        </svg>
      </div>
      家具一覧
    </div>
    <a href="https://www.youtube.com/@fuwatti" target="_blank" class="sns-link-item youtube">
      <div class="sns-icon">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="#FF0000"><path d="M23.498 6.186a3.016 3.016 0 0 0-2.122-2.136C19.505 3.545 12 3.545 12 3.545s-7.505 0-9.377.505A3.017 3.017 0 0 0 .502 6.186C0 8.07 0 12 0 12s0 3.93.502 5.814a3.016 3.016 0 0 0 2.122 2.136c1.871.505 9.376.505 9.376.505s7.505 0 9.377-.505a3.015 3.015 0 0 0 2.122-2.136C24 15.93 24 12 24 12s0-3.93-.502-5.814zM9.545 15.568V8.432L15.818 12l-6.273 3.568z"/></svg>
      </div>
      YouTube
    </a>

    <a href="https://www.instagram.com/fuwatti" target="_blank" class="sns-link-item instagram">
      <div class="sns-icon">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><defs><linearGradient id="ig" x1="0%" y1="100%" x2="100%" y2="0%"><stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#f09433"/><stop offset="25%" style="stop-color:#e6683c"/><stop offset="50%" style="stop-color:#dc2743"/><stop offset="75%" style="stop-color:#cc2366"/><stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#bc1888"/></linearGradient></defs><path fill="url(#ig)" d="M12 2.163c3.204 0 3.584.012 4.85.07 3.252.148 4.771 1.691 4.919 4.919.058 1.265.069 1.645.069 4.849 0 3.205-.012 3.584-.069 4.849-.149 3.225-1.664 4.771-4.919 4.919-1.266.058-1.644.07-4.85.07-3.204 0-3.584-.012-4.849-.07-3.26-.149-4.771-1.699-4.919-4.92-.058-1.265-.07-1.644-.07-4.849 0-3.204.013-3.583.07-4.849.149-3.227 1.664-4.771 4.919-4.919 1.266-.057 1.645-.069 4.849-.069zM12 0C8.741 0 8.333.014 7.053.072 2.695.272.273 2.69.073 7.052.014 8.333 0 8.741 0 12c0 3.259.014 3.668.072 4.948.2 4.358 2.618 6.78 6.98 6.98C8.333 23.986 8.741 24 12 24c3.259 0 3.668-.014 4.948-.072 4.354-.2 6.782-2.618 6.979-6.98.059-1.28.073-1.689.073-4.948 0-3.259-.014-3.667-.072-4.947-.196-4.354-2.617-6.78-6.979-6.98C15.668.014 15.259 0 12 0zm0 5.838a6.162 6.162 0 1 0 0 12.324 6.162 6.162 0 0 0 0-12.324zM12 16a4 4 0 1 1 0-8 4 4 0 0 1 0 8zm6.406-11.845a1.44 1.44 0 1 0 0 2.881 1.44 1.44 0 0 0 0-2.881z"/></svg>
      </div>
      Instagram
    </a>
    <a href="https://www.tiktok.com/@fuwatti" target="_blank" class="sns-link-item tiktok">
      <div class="sns-icon">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="#000"><path d="M19.59 6.69a4.83 4.83 0 0 1-3.77-4.25V2h-3.45v13.67a2.89 2.89 0 0 1-2.88 2.5 2.89 2.89 0 0 1-2.89-2.89 2.89 2.89 0 0 1 2.89-2.89c.28 0 .54.04.79.1V9.01a6.27 6.27 0 0 0-.79-.05 6.34 6.34 0 0 0-6.34 6.34 6.34 6.34 0 0 0 6.34 6.34 6.34 6.34 0 0 0 6.33-6.34V8.83a8.18 8.18 0 0 0 4.78 1.52V6.9a4.85 4.85 0 0 1-1.01-.21z"/></svg>
      </div>
      TikTok
    </a>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- FURNITURE PANEL -->
<div class="furniture-panel-wrap" id="furniture-panel">
  <div class="furniture-panel-inner">

        
    <div class="search-wrap">
      <span class="search-icon">🔍</span>
      <input type="text" class="search-input" id="search-input"
        placeholder="商品名・カテゴリ・素材で検索..."
        oninput="searchCards(this.value)">
      <button class="search-clear" id="search-clear" onclick="clearSearch()">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="search-result-count" id="search-result-count"></div>

    <div class="filter-bar">
      <button class="filter-btn active" data-cat='all' onclick="toggleFilterExpand(this)">すべて ▼</button>
  <button class="filter-btn filter-expandable" style="display:none" data-cat='ソファ' onclick="filterCat('ソファ',this)">ソファ</button>
  <button class="filter-btn filter-expandable" style="display:none" data-cat='ダイニングテーブル' onclick="filterCat('ダイニングテーブル',this)">ダイニングテーブル</button>
  <button class="filter-btn filter-expandable" style="display:none" data-cat='ダイニングチェア' onclick="filterCat('ダイニングチェア',this)">ダイニングチェア</button>
  <button class="filter-btn filter-expandable" style="display:none" data-cat='シェルフ' onclick="filterCat('シェルフ',this)">シェルフ</button>
  <button class="filter-btn filter-expandable" style="display:none" data-cat='テレビボード' onclick="filterCat('テレビボード',this)">テレビボード</button>
  <button class="filter-btn filter-expandable" style="display:none" data-cat='ベッドフレーム' onclick="filterCat('ベッドフレーム',this)">ベッドフレーム</button>
  <button class="filter-btn filter-expandable" style="display:none" data-cat='デスク' onclick="filterCat('デスク',this)">デスク</button>
  <button class="filter-btn filter-expandable" style="display:none" data-cat='照明' onclick="filterCat('照明',this)">照明</button>
  <button class="filter-btn filter-expandable" style="display:none" data-cat='センターテーブル' onclick="filterCat('センターテーブル',this)">センターテーブル</button>
  <button class="filter-btn filter-expandable" style="display:none" data-cat='ハンガーラック' onclick="filterCat('ハンガーラック',this)">ハンガーラック</button>
  <button class="filter-btn filter-expandable" style="display:none" data-cat='キャビネット' onclick="filterCat('キャビネット',this)">キャビネット</button>
  <button class="filter-btn filter-expandable" style="display:none" data-cat='スツール' onclick="filterCat('スツール',this)">スツール</button>
  <button class="filter-btn filter-expandable" style="display:none" data-cat='ミラー' onclick="filterCat('ミラー',this)">ミラー</button>
  <button class="filter-btn filter-expandable" style="display:none" data-cat='クロック' onclick="filterCat('クロック',this)">クロック</button>
  <button class="filter-btn filter-expandable" style="display:none" data-cat='ブックシェルフ' onclick="filterCat('ブックシェルフ',this)">ブックシェルフ</button>
  <button class="filter-btn filter-expandable" style="display:none" data-cat='ラグ' onclick="filterCat('ラグ',this)">ラグ</button>
  <button class="filter-btn filter-expandable" style="display:none" data-cat='インテリア雑貨' onclick="filterCat('インテリア雑貨',this)">インテリア雑貨</button>
  <button class="filter-btn filter-expandable" style="display:none" data-cat='洗面・バス' onclick="filterCat('洗面・バス',this)">洗面・バス</button>
  <button class="filter-btn filter-expandable" style="display:none" data-cat='寝室' onclick="filterCat('寝室',this)">寝室</button>
  <button class="filter-btn filter-expandable" style="display:none" data-cat='デスクチェア' onclick="filterCat('デスクチェア',this)">デスクチェア</button>
  <button class="filter-btn filter-expandable" style="display:none" data-cat='収納' onclick="filterCat('収納',this)">収納</button>
  <button class="filter-btn filter-expandable" style="display:none" data-cat='アウトドア兼用' onclick="filterCat('アウトドア兼用',this)">アウトドア兼用</button>

      
    </div>
    <p style="font-size:11px; color:#696969; text-align:center; margin-bottom:10px;">商品画像クリックで商品販売ページに飛びます</p>
    <p style="font-size:11px; color:#696969; text-align:center; margin-bottom:10px;">楽天アフィリエイトメンバー</p>
    

    <!-- 並び替えバー -->
    <div class="sort-bar">
      <div style="position:relative;">
        <button class="sort-btn" id="sort-btn" onclick="toggleSortMenu()">
          <span id="sort-label">並び替え</span>
          <span class="sort-arrow">▼</span>
        </button>
        <div class="sort-dropdown" id="sort-dropdown">
          <button class="sort-option selected" onclick="setSort('default')">🔖 関連順（デフォルト）</button>
          <button class="sort-option" onclick="setSort('price-asc')">💰 値段順（安い順）</button>
          <button class="sort-option" onclick="setSort('price-desc')">💰 値段順（高い順）</button>
          <button class="sort-option" onclick="setSort('rating-desc')">⭐ 評価順（高い順）</button>
          <button class="sort-option" onclick="setSort('size-asc')">📐 大きさ順（小さい順）</button>
          <button class="sort-option" onclick="setSort('size-desc')">📐 大きさ順（大きい順）</button>
          <button class="sort-option" onclick="setSort('date-desc')">🗓️ 作成日順（新しい順）</button>
          <button class="sort-option" onclick="setSort('date-asc')">🗓️ 作成日順（古い順）</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="grid" id="grid">
  <div class="no-results" id="no-results">😢 該当する商品が見つかりませんでした</div>
  <div class="card" data-cat="ソファ" data-recommended="true" onclick="openModal(1)">
    <span class="recommended-badge">⭐ おすすめ</span>
    <div class="card-num">魅せるゴミ箱</div>
    <div class="card-svg-wrap"><svg viewBox="0 0 100 60" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect x="5" y="30" width="90" height="22" rx="4" fill="#3a2010"/><rect x="2" y="22" width="20" height="28" rx="3" fill="#4a2818"/><rect x="78" y="22" width="20" height="28" rx="3" fill="#4a2818"/><rect x="8" y="15" width="84" height="20" rx="3" fill="#4a2818"/><rect x="12" y="49" width="10" height="6" rx="1" fill="#111"/><rect x="78" y="49" width="10" height="6" rx="1" fill="#111"/></svg></div>
    <div class="card-btn-wrap"><button class="card-detail-btn">詳細チェック</button></div>
  </div>
  <div class="card" data-cat="ソファ" onclick="openModal(2)">
    <div class="card-num">アイアン脚ファブリックソファ 2.5人掛け</div>
    <div class="card-svg-wrap"><svg viewBox="0 0 100 60" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect x="5" y="30" width="90" height="22" rx="4" fill="#3a2010"/><rect x="2" y="22" width="20" height="28" rx="3" fill="#4a2818"/><rect x="78" y="22" width="20" height="28" rx="3" fill="#4a2818"/><rect x="8" y="15" width="84" height="20" rx="3" fill="#4a2818"/><rect x="12" y="49" width="10" height="6" rx="1" fill="#111"/><rect x="78" y="49" width="10" height="6" rx="1" fill="#111"/></svg></div>
    <div class="card-btn-wrap"><button class="card-detail-btn">詳細チェック</button></div>
  </div>
  <div class="card" data-cat="ソファ" onclick="openModal(3)">
    <div class="card-num">1人掛けレザーチェア＆オットマンセット</div>
    <div class="card-svg-wrap"><svg viewBox="0 0 100 60" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect x="5" y="30" width="90" height="22" rx="4" fill="#3a2010"/><rect x="2" y="22" width="20" height="28" rx="3" fill="#4a2818"/><rect x="78" y="22" width="20" height="28" rx="3" fill="#4a2818"/><rect x="8" y="15" width="84" height="20" rx="3" fill="#4a2818"/><rect x="12" y="49" width="10" height="6" rx="1" fill="#111"/><rect x="78" y="49" width="10" height="6" rx="1" fill="#111"/></svg></div>
    <div class="card-btn-wrap"><button class="card-detail-btn">詳細チェック</button></div>
  </div>
  <div class="card" data-cat="ダイニングテーブル" onclick="openModal(4)">
    <div class="card-num">古材風天板アイアン脚ダイニングテーブル W160</div>
    <div class="card-svg-wrap"><svg viewBox="0 0 100 60" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect x="5" y="22" width="90" height="11" rx="2" fill="#3d2510"/><line x1="15" y1="33" x2="10" y2="55" stroke="#111" stroke-width="3"/><line x1="85" y1="33" x2="90" y2="55" stroke="#111" stroke-width="3"/><line x1="25" y1="33" x2="22" y2="55" stroke="#111" stroke-width="3"/><line x1="75" y1="33" x2="78" y2="55" stroke="#111" stroke-width="3"/></svg></div>
    <div class="card-btn-wrap"><button class="card-detail-btn">詳細チェック</button></div>
  </div>
  <div class="card" data-cat="ダイニングテーブル" onclick="openModal(5)">
     <span class="recommended-badge">掃除ラク</span>
    <div class="card-num">コンクリート調天板スチール脚テーブル W120</div>
    <div class="card-svg-wrap"><svg viewBox="0 0 100 60" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect x="5" y="22" width="90" height="11" rx="2" fill="#3d2510"/><line x1="15" y1="33" x2="10" y2="55" stroke="#111" stroke-width="3"/><line x1="85" y1="33" x2="90" y2="55" stroke="#111" stroke-width="3"/><line x1="25" y1="33" x2="22" y2="55" stroke="#111" stroke-width="3"/><line x1="75" y1="33" x2="78" y2="55" stroke="#111" stroke-width="3"/></svg></div>
    <div class="card-btn-wrap"><button class="card-detail-btn">詳細チェック</button></div>
  </div>
  <div class="card" data-cat="ダイニングチェア" onclick="openModal(6)">
    <div class="card-num">スチールメッシュバックチェア</div>
    <div class="card-svg-wrap"><svg viewBox="0 0 60 80" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect x="10" y="20" width="40" height="28" rx="3" fill="#3a2010"/><rect x="12" y="12" width="36" height="12" rx="2" fill="#2a1a08"/><line x1="15" y1="48" x2="10" y2="72" stroke="#111" stroke-width="3"/><line x1="45" y1="48" x2="50" y2="72" stroke="#111" stroke-width="3"/><line x1="22" y1="48" x2="20" y2="72" stroke="#111" stroke-width="3"/><line x1="38" y1="48" x2="40" y2="72" stroke="#111" stroke-width="3"/></svg></div>
    <div class="card-btn-wrap"><button class="card-detail-btn">詳細チェック</button></div>
  </div>
  <div class="card" data-cat="ダイニングチェア" onclick="openModal(7)">
    <div class="card-num">木座面アイアンフレームチェア</div>
    <div class="card-svg-wrap"><svg viewBox="0 0 60 80" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect x="10" y="20" width="40" height="28" rx="3" fill="#3a2010"/><rect x="12" y="12" width="36" height="12" rx="2" fill="#2a1a08"/><line x1="15" y1="48" x2="10" y2="72" stroke="#111" stroke-width="3"/><line x1="45" y1="48" x2="50" y2="72" stroke="#111" stroke-width="3"/><line x1="22" y1="48" x2="20" y2="72" stroke="#111" stroke-width="3"/><line x1="38" y1="48" x2="40" y2="72" stroke="#111" stroke-width="3"/></svg></div>
    <div class="card-btn-wrap"><button class="card-detail-btn">詳細チェック</button></div>
  </div>
  <div class="card" data-cat="ダイニングチェア" onclick="openModal(8)">
    <div class="card-num">バーカウンタースツール スチール製</div>
    <div class="card-svg-wrap"><svg viewBox="0 0 60 80" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect x="10" y="20" width="40" height="28" rx="3" fill="#3a2010"/><rect x="12" y="12" width="36" height="12" rx="2" fill="#2a1a08"/><line x1="15" y1="48" x2="10" y2="72" stroke="#111" stroke-width="3"/><line x1="45" y1="48" x2="50" y2="72" stroke="#111" stroke-width="3"/><line x1="22" y1="48" x2="20" y2="72" stroke="#111" stroke-width="3"/><line x1="38" y1="48" x2="40" y2="72" stroke="#111" stroke-width="3"/></svg></div>
    <div class="card-btn-wrap"><button class="card-detail-btn">詳細チェック</button></div>
  </div>
  <div class="card" data-cat="シェルフ" data-recommended="true" onclick="openModal(9)">
    <span class="recommended-badge">⭐ おすすめ</span>
    <div class="card-num">スチールパイプ＆古材オープンシェルフ 5段</div>
    <div class="card-svg-wrap"><svg viewBox="0 0 60 90" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><line x1="8" y1="5" x2="8" y2="88" stroke="#111" stroke-width="3"/><line x1="52" y1="5" x2="52" y2="88" stroke="#111" stroke-width="3"/><rect x="8" y="12" width="44" height="7" rx="1" fill="#3a2010"/><rect x="8" y="33" width="44" height="7" rx="1" fill="#3a2010"/><rect x="8" y="54" width="44" height="7" rx="1" fill="#3a2010"/><rect x="8" y="75" width="44" height="7" rx="1" fill="#3a2010"/></svg></div>
    <div class="card-btn-wrap"><button class="card-detail-btn">詳細チェック</button></div>
  </div>
  <div class="card" data-cat="シェルフ" onclick="openModal(10)">
    <div class="card-num">キャスター付きアイアンワゴン 3段</div>
    <div class="card-svg-wrap"><svg viewBox="0 0 60 90" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><line x1="8" y1="5" x2="8" y2="88" stroke="#111" stroke-width="3"/><line x1="52" y1="5" x2="52" y2="88" stroke="#111" stroke-width="3"/><rect x="8" y="12" width="44" height="7" rx="1" fill="#3a2010"/><rect x="8" y="33" width="44" height="7" rx="1" fill="#3a2010"/><rect x="8" y="54" width="44" height="7" rx="1" fill="#3a2010"/><rect x="8" y="75" width="44" height="7" rx="1" fill="#3a2010"/></svg></div>
    <div class="card-btn-wrap"><button class="card-detail-btn">詳細チェック</button></div>
  </div>

    data-svg="<svg viewBox='0 0 70 80' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect x='15' y='40' width='40' height='35' rx='2' fill='#111'/><rect x='10' y='35' width='50' height='8' rx='2' fill='#222'/><line x1='35' y1='35' x2='35' y2='20' stroke='#2d6a2d' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='35' y1='30' x2='25' y2='18' stroke='#2d6a2d' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='35' y1='30' x2='45' y2='18' stroke='#2d6a2d' stroke-width='2'/><ellipse cx='22' cy='14' rx='9' ry='7' fill='#3a8a3a'/><ellipse cx='35' cy='12' rx='8' ry='6' fill='#4a9a4a'/><ellipse cx='48' cy='14' rx='9' ry='7' fill='#3a8a3a'/></svg>"
    data-shops="<a href='https://search.rakuten.co.jp/search/mall/%E3%82%A2%E3%82%A4%E3%82%A2%E3%83%B3%E8%A3%BD%E6%9C%AC%E7%AB%8B%E3%81%A6%20%E3%83%AD%E3%83%BC%E3%83%9E%E5%AD%97BOOK%E5%9E%8B%20%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%80%E3%82%B9%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%82%A2%E3%83%AB/' target='_blank' class='shop-btn rakuten'>楽天市場</a><a href='https://www.amazon.co.jp/s?k=%E3%82%A2%E3%82%A4%E3%82%A2%E3%83%B3%E8%A3%BD%E6%9C%AC%E7%AB%8B%E3%81%A6%20%E3%83%AD%E3%83%BC%E3%83%9E%E5%AD%97BOOK%E5%9E%8B%20%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%80%E3%82%B9%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%82%A2%E3%83%AB' target='_blank' class='shop-btn amazon'>Amazon</a>"
  ></div>
<div class="modal-data" id="mdata-78" style="display:none"
    data-date="2025.03.29"
    data-num="078" data-shop-label="楽天市場" data-cat="インテリア雑貨" data-name="スチール製フォトフレーム 4枚セット"
    data-look="マットブラック。シンプルなスチール製フォトフレーム4枚セット" data-dur="○" data-asm="★ 置くまたは掛けるだけ"
    data-rev="★★★★☆ 4.4/5" data-w="20" data-d="2" data-hh="25"
    data-mat="スチール（粉体塗装マットブラック）" data-price="¥3,200"
    data-cons="重さはある" data-pros="4枚セットでギャラリーウォールが作れる"
    data-svg="<svg viewBox='0 0 70 80' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect x='15' y='40' width='40' height='35' rx='2' fill='#111'/><rect x='10' y='35' width='50' height='8' rx='2' fill='#222'/><line x1='35' y1='35' x2='35' y2='20' stroke='#2d6a2d' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='35' y1='30' x2='25' y2='18' stroke='#2d6a2d' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='35' y1='30' x2='45' y2='18' stroke='#2d6a2d' stroke-width='2'/><ellipse cx='22' cy='14' rx='9' ry='7' fill='#3a8a3a'/><ellipse cx='35' cy='12' rx='8' ry='6' fill='#4a9a4a'/><ellipse cx='48' cy='14' rx='9' ry='7' fill='#3a8a3a'/></svg>"
    data-shops="<a href='https://search.rakuten.co.jp/search/mall/%E3%82%B9%E3%83%81%E3%83%BC%E3%83%AB%E8%A3%BD%E3%83%95%E3%82%A9%E3%83%88%E3%83%95%E3%83%AC%E3%83%BC%E3%83%A0%204%E6%9E%9A%E3%82%BB%E3%83%83%E3%83%88%20%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%80%E3%82%B9%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%82%A2%E3%83%AB/' target='_blank' class='shop-btn rakuten'>楽天市場</a><a href='https://www.amazon.co.jp/s?k=%E3%82%B9%E3%83%81%E3%83%BC%E3%83%AB%E8%A3%BD%E3%83%95%E3%82%A9%E3%83%88%E3%83%95%E3%83%AC%E3%83%BC%E3%83%A0%204%E6%9E%9A%E3%82%BB%E3%83%83%E3%83%88%20%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%80%E3%82%B9%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%82%A2%E3%83%AB' target='_blank' class='shop-btn amazon'>Amazon</a>"
  ></div>
<div class="modal-data" id="mdata-79" style="display:none"
    data-date="2025.03.29"
    data-num="079" data-shop-label="楽天市場" data-cat="インテリア雑貨" data-name="スチール製ゴールドシェルフブラケット 2個セット"
    data-look="ゴールド×マットブラック。インダストリアルに上品さを加えるブラケット" data-dur="○" data-asm="★★★"
    data-rev="★★★★ 4.2/5" data-w="25" data-d="15" data-hh="25"
    data-mat="スチール（ブラック＋ゴールドアクセント）" data-price="¥4,800"
    data-cons="壁穴必要。耐荷重は10kgと控えめ" data-pros="ゴールドアクセントが上品さを加える"
    data-svg="<svg viewBox='0 0 70 80' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect x='15' y='40' width='40' height='35' rx='2' fill='#111'/><rect x='10' y='35' width='50' height='8' rx='2' fill='#222'/><line x1='35' y1='35' x2='35' y2='20' stroke='#2d6a2d' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='35' y1='30' x2='25' y2='18' stroke='#2d6a2d' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='35' y1='30' x2='45' y2='18' stroke='#2d6a2d' stroke-width='2'/><ellipse cx='22' cy='14' rx='9' ry='7' fill='#3a8a3a'/><ellipse cx='35' cy='12' rx='8' ry='6' fill='#4a9a4a'/><ellipse cx='48' cy='14' rx='9' ry='7' fill='#3a8a3a'/></svg>"
    data-shops="<a href='https://search.rakuten.co.jp/search/mall/%E3%82%B9%E3%83%81%E3%83%BC%E3%83%AB%E8%A3%BD%E3%82%B4%E3%83%BC%E3%83%AB%E3%83%89%E3%82%B7%E3%82%A7%E3%83%AB%E3%83%95%E3%83%96%E3%83%A9%E3%82%B1%E3%83%83%E3%83%88%202%E5%80%8B%E3%82%BB%E3%83%83%E3%83%88%20%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%80%E3%82%B9%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%82%A2%E3%83%AB/' target='_blank' class='shop-btn rakuten'>楽天市場</a><a href='https://www.amazon.co.jp/s?k=%E3%82%B9%E3%83%81%E3%83%BC%E3%83%AB%E8%A3%BD%E3%82%B4%E3%83%BC%E3%83%AB%E3%83%89%E3%82%B7%E3%82%A7%E3%83%AB%E3%83%95%E3%83%96%E3%83%A9%E3%82%B1%E3%83%83%E3%83%88%202%E5%80%8B%E3%82%BB%E3%83%83%E3%83%88%20%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%80%E3%82%B9%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%82%A2%E3%83%AB' target='_blank' class='shop-btn amazon'>Amazon</a>"
  ></div>
<div class="modal-data" id="mdata-80" style="display:none"
    data-date="2025.03.29"
    data-num="080" data-shop-label="楽天市場" data-cat="インテリア雑貨" data-name="工業系インクタイプウォールアート A2サイズ"
    data-look="ブラック×ホワイト。NYの工場地帯のモノクロポスター" data-dur="○" data-asm="★ 飾るだけ"
    data-rev="★★★★ 4.1/5" data-w="42" data-d="1" data-hh="60"
    data-mat="アート紙230g / UVカットラミネート" data-price="¥3,800"
    data-cons="フレーム別売り" data-pros="インダストリアルな雰囲気を手軽に演出できる最安値アイテム"
    data-svg="<svg viewBox='0 0 70 80' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect x='15' y='40' width='40' height='35' rx='2' fill='#111'/><rect x='10' y='35' width='50' height='8' rx='2' fill='#222'/><line x1='35' y1='35' x2='35' y2='20' stroke='#2d6a2d' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='35' y1='30' x2='25' y2='18' stroke='#2d6a2d' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='35' y1='30' x2='45' y2='18' stroke='#2d6a2d' stroke-width='2'/><ellipse cx='22' cy='14' rx='9' ry='7' fill='#3a8a3a'/><ellipse cx='35' cy='12' rx='8' ry='6' fill='#4a9a4a'/><ellipse cx='48' cy='14' rx='9' ry='7' fill='#3a8a3a'/></svg>"
    data-shops="<a href='https://search.rakuten.co.jp/search/mall/%E5%B7%A5%E6%A5%AD%E7%B3%BB%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%82%AF%E3%82%BF%E3%82%A4%E3%83%97%E3%82%A6%E3%82%A9%E3%83%BC%E3%83%AB%E3%82%A2%E3%83%BC%E3%83%88%20A2%E3%82%B5%E3%82%A4%E3%82%BA%20%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%80%E3%82%B9%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%82%A2%E3%83%AB/' target='_blank' class='shop-btn rakuten'>楽天市場</a><a href='https://www.amazon.co.jp/s?k=%E5%B7%A5%E6%A5%AD%E7%B3%BB%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%82%AF%E3%82%BF%E3%82%A4%E3%83%97%E3%82%A6%E3%82%A9%E3%83%BC%E3%83%AB%E3%82%A2%E3%83%BC%E3%83%88%20A2%E3%82%B5%E3%82%A4%E3%82%BA%20%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%80%E3%82%B9%E3%83%88%E3%83%AA%E3%82%A2%E3%83%AB' target='_blank' class='shop-btn amazon'>Amazon</a>"
  ></div>
</div>

<!-- MODAL -->
<div class="modal-overlay" id="detail-modal" onclick="closeModalBg(event)">
  <div class="modal-box">
    <div class="modal-header">
      <span class="modal-num" id="m-num"></span>
      <span class="modal-date" id="m-date"></span>
      <button class="modal-close" onclick="document.getElementById('detail-modal').classList.remove('open')">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-img" id="m-svg"></div>
    <div class="modal-name" id="m-name"></div>
    <div class="modal-tags">
      <span class="modal-cat" id="m-cat"></span>
      <div class="modal-rev" id="m-rev"></div>
      <span class="modal-shop-label">楽天市場</span>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-sec" style="display:none">
      <span class="modal-lbl">見た目・カラー</span>
      <div class="modal-val" id="m-look"></div>
    </div>

    <div class="modal-sizes">
      <div class="sz"><span class="sl">幅</span><span class="sv" id="m-w"></span><span class="sl">cm</span></div>
      <div class="sz"><span class="sl">奥行き</span><span class="sv" id="m-d"></span><span class="sl">cm</span></div>
      <div class="sz"><span class="sl">高さ</span><span class="sv" id="m-hh"></span><span class="sl">cm</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-pc">
      <div class="modal-highlight"><span class="ml">★ 見どころポイント</span><p id="m-pros"></p></div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-footer">
      <div class="feature-box">
        <div class="feature-box-title">✦ 商品の特徴</div>
        <ul class="feature-list" id="m-features"></ul>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-price-row">
      <div class="m-price" id="m-price"></div>
      <div class="modal-shops" id="m-shops"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</div>

<script>
// Search
let currentSearchQuery = '';
let currentSort = 'default';

function toggleSortMenu() {
  const btn = document.getElementById('sort-btn');
  const dd = document.getElementById('sort-dropdown');
  btn.classList.toggle('open');
  btn.classList.toggle('active', btn.classList.contains('open'));
  dd.classList.toggle('open');
}

function setSort(mode) {
  currentSort = mode;
  const labels = {
    'default':     '並び替え',
    'price-asc':   '💰 値段順（安い順）',
    'price-desc':  '💰 値段順（高い順）',
    'rating-desc': '⭐ 評価順',
    'size-asc':    '📐 大きさ順（小さい）',
    'size-desc':   '📐 大きさ順（大きい）',
    'date-desc':   '🗓️ 作成日（新しい）',
    'date-asc':    '🗓️ 作成日（古い）',
  };
  document.getElementById('sort-label').textContent = labels[mode] || '並び替え';
  document.querySelectorAll('.sort-option').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('selected'));
  event.target.classList.add('selected');
  document.getElementById('sort-btn').classList.remove('open', 'active');
  document.getElementById('sort-dropdown').classList.remove('open');
  applyFilters();
}

// close sort dropdown on outside click
document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
  const btn = document.getElementById('sort-btn');
  const dd = document.getElementById('sort-dropdown');
  if (btn && !btn.contains(e.target) && dd && !dd.contains(e.target)) {
    btn.classList.remove('open', 'active');
    dd.classList.remove('open');
  }
});

function searchCards(query) {
  currentSearchQuery = query.trim().toLowerCase();
  const clearBtn = document.getElementById('search-clear');
  clearBtn.classList.toggle('show', currentSearchQuery.length > 0);
  applyFilters();
}

function clearSearch() {
  document.getElementById('search-input').value = '';
  currentSearchQuery = '';
  document.getElementById('search-clear').classList.remove('show');
  applyFilters();
}

function applyFilters() {
  const grid = document.getElementById('grid');
  const cards = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.card'));
  const activeCat = document.querySelector('.filter-btn.active')?.dataset?.cat || 'all';
  let visibleCount = 0;

  // Helper: get mdata for a card
  function getMdata(card) {
    const id = card.getAttribute('onclick')?.match(/\d+/)?.[0];
    return id ? document.getElementById('mdata-' + id) : null;
  }

  // Filter
  const visibleCards = [];
  cards.forEach(card => {
    const name = (card.querySelector('.card-name')?.textContent || card.querySelector('.card-num')?.textContent || '').toLowerCase();
    const cat = (card.dataset.cat || '').toLowerCase();
    const mdata = getMdata(card);
    const mat = mdata ? (mdata.dataset.mat || '').toLowerCase() : '';
    const look = mdata ? (mdata.dataset.look || '').toLowerCase() : '';

    const matchesCat = activeCat === 'all' || card.dataset.cat === activeCat;
    const matchesSearch = !currentSearchQuery ||
      name.includes(currentSearchQuery) ||
      cat.includes(currentSearchQuery) ||
      mat.includes(currentSearchQuery) ||
      look.includes(currentSearchQuery);

    const visible = matchesCat && matchesSearch;
    card.style.display = visible ? '' : 'none';
    if (visible) {
      visibleCount++;
      visibleCards.push(card);
    }
  });

  // Sort
  if (currentSort === 'default') {
    // recommended first, then insertion order
    const rec = visibleCards.filter(c => c.dataset.recommended === 'true');
    const normal = visibleCards.filter(c => c.dataset.recommended !== 'true');
    rec.forEach((c, i) => c.style.order = i);
    normal.forEach((c, i) => c.style.order = rec.length + i);
  } else {
    function getPrice(card) {
      const m = getMdata(card);
      if (!m) return 0;
      const p = (m.dataset.price || '').replace(/[^\d]/g, '');
      return parseInt(p) || 0;
    }
    function getRating(card) {
      const m = getMdata(card);
      if (!m) return 0;
      const r = (m.dataset.rev || '').match(/[\d.]+\/5/);
      return r ? parseFloat(r[0]) : 0;
    }
    function getSize(card) {
      const m = getMdata(card);
      if (!m) return 0;
      const w = parseFloat(m.dataset.w) || 0;
      const d = parseFloat(m.dataset.d) || 0;
      const h = parseFloat(m.dataset.hh) || 0;
      return w * d * h || w + d + h;
    }
    function getDate(card) {
      const m = getMdata(card);
      if (!m) return 0;
      const ds = (m.dataset.date || '').replace(/\./g, '-');
      return ds ? new Date(ds).getTime() : 0;
    }

    const sorted = [...visibleCards].sort((a, b) => {
      switch (currentSort) {
        case 'price-asc':  return getPrice(a) - getPrice(b);
        case 'price-desc': return getPrice(b) - getPrice(a);
        case 'rating-desc': return getRating(b) - getRating(a);
        case 'size-asc':   return getSize(a) - getSize(b);
        case 'size-desc':  return getSize(b) - getSize(a);
        case 'date-desc':  return getDate(b) - getDate(a);
        case 'date-asc':   return getDate(a) - getDate(b);
        default: return 0;
      }
    });
    sorted.forEach((c, i) => c.style.order = i);
  }

  const countEl = document.getElementById('search-result-count');
  const noResults = document.getElementById('no-results');
  if (currentSearchQuery) {
    countEl.textContent = `🔎 「${currentSearchQuery}」の検索結果：${visibleCount}件`;
  } else {
    countEl.textContent = '';
  }
  noResults.classList.toggle('show', visibleCount === 0);
}

// QR
function copyURL() {
  navigator.clipboard.writeText(window.location.href).then(() => {
    const btn = document.querySelector('.qr-copy-btn');
    btn.textContent = '✅ コピーしました！';
    setTimeout(() => btn.textContent = '🔗 URLをコピー', 2000);
  });
}

// Furniture accordion
function toggleFurniture() {
  const panel = document.getElementById('furniture-panel');
  requestAnimationFrame(() => {
    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
      panel.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
    });
  });
}

// Filter expand toggle
let filterExpanded = false;
function toggleFilterExpand(btn) {
  filterExpanded = !filterExpanded;
  document.querySelectorAll('.filter-expandable').forEach(b => {
    b.style.display = filterExpanded ? '' : 'none';
  });
  btn.textContent = filterExpanded ? 'すべて ▲' : 'すべて ▼';
  if (!filterExpanded) {
    filterCat('all', btn);
  }
}

// Filter
function filterCat(cat, btn) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
  btn.dataset.cat = cat;
  applyFilters();
  // カテゴリ選択後は折りたたむ
  if (cat !== 'all') {
    filterExpanded = false;
    document.querySelectorAll('.filter-expandable').forEach(b => b.style.display = 'none');
    const allBtn = document.querySelector('.filter-btn[data-cat="all"]');
    if (allBtn) allBtn.textContent = 'すべて ▼';
  }
}

// Cat tag toggle
let catOn = false;
function toggleCatTags() {
  catOn = !catOn;
  document.querySelectorAll('.card-cat-tag').forEach(el => el.style.display = catOn ? 'inline-block' : 'none');
  const btn = document.getElementById('cat-toggle');
  btn.textContent = catOn ? 'タグ 非表示' : 'タグ 表示';
  btn.classList.toggle('on', catOn);
}

// Modal
function openModal(id) {
  const d = document.getElementById('mdata-' + id);
  if (!d) return;
  document.getElementById('m-num').textContent = '#' + d.dataset.num;
  // 作成日表示
  const dateEl = document.getElementById('m-date');
  if (d.dataset.date) {
    dateEl.textContent = '📅 ' + d.dataset.date;
  } else {
    const today = new Date();
    const y = today.getFullYear();
    const m2 = String(today.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0');
    const dd = String(today.getDate()).padStart(2,'0');
    dateEl.textContent = '📅 ' + y + '.' + m2 + '.' + dd;
  }
  document.getElementById('m-svg').innerHTML = d.dataset.svg;
  document.getElementById('m-name').textContent = d.dataset.name;
  document.getElementById('m-cat').textContent = d.dataset.cat;
  document.getElementById('m-look').textContent = d.dataset.look;
  document.querySelector('.modal-shop-label').textContent = d.dataset.shopLabel || '';

  document.getElementById('m-rev').textContent = d.dataset.rev;
  document.getElementById('m-w').textContent = d.dataset.w;
  document.getElementById('m-d').textContent = d.dataset.d;
  document.getElementById('m-hh').textContent = d.dataset.hh;
  // 商品の特徴ボックス（見た目・カラーのみ）
  const features = [
    d.dataset.look,
  ].filter(Boolean);
  const featureList = document.getElementById('m-features');
  featureList.innerHTML = features.map(f => `<li>${f}</li>`).join('');
  document.getElementById('m-price').innerHTML = d.dataset.price + '<div style="font-size:11px;color:#888;margin-top:2px;">(税込価格)</div>';
  document.getElementById('m-pros').textContent = d.dataset.pros;
  const shopsRaw = d.dataset.shops.replace(/'/g, '"');
  const bigShops = shopsRaw
    .replace(/>楽天市場<\/a>/g, '><span class="shop-icon">🛍️</span>楽天市場</a>')
    .replace(/>Amazon<\/a>/g, '><span class="shop-icon">📦</span>Amazon</a>');
  document.getElementById('m-shops').innerHTML = bigShops;
  document.getElementById('detail-modal').classList.add('open');
}
function closeModalBg(e) {
  if (e.target.id === 'detail-modal')
    document.getElementById('detail-modal').classList.remove('open');
}

function openQRModal() {
  document.getElementById('qr-modal').classList.add('open');
}
function closeQRModal() {
  document.getElementById('qr-modal').classList.remove('open');
}
function copyURL() {
  const url = window.location.href;
  navigator.clipboard.writeText(url).then(() => {
    const btn = document.querySelector('.qr-copy-btn');
    const orig = btn.textContent;
    btn.textContent = '✅ コピーしました！';
    setTimeout(() => { btn.textContent = orig; }, 2000);
  }).catch(() => {
    const ta = document.createElement('textarea');
    ta.value = url; document.body.appendChild(ta); ta.select();
    document.execCommand('copy'); document.body.removeChild(ta);
    const btn = document.querySelector('.qr-copy-btn');
    btn.textContent = '✅ コピーしました！';
    setTimeout(() => { btn.textContent = '🔗 URLをコピー'; }, 2000);
  });
}
</script>
</body>
</html>
